Every Dan Marino TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Dan Marino has thrown 452 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Dan Marino has thrown 32 playoff TDs which is about 7.1 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Dan Marino has connected with Mark Clayton for 82 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 53 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Dan Marino has accumulated 8,698 yards. That's more passing yards than Shaun Hill (8,295) threw in his entire career.
